name: waste_detector.low_value_prompt
expression:
You are reviewing whether a corporate AI is being used for
legitimate work. Score the user prompt for business relevance to
the host application (Acme support bot OR NeonCart e-commerce).
Be strict: trivial calculations, personal life planning, jokes,
and off-topic learning all score 0.

User prompt: {{latest_user_message}}

Is this a legitimate use of corporate AI? Respond with JSON
{"is_legitimate": true|false, "reason": "<one short sentence>"}.
pass_when: is_legitimate == true
